# APP-d00001: App needs an append-only log

**Level**: dev | **Status**: Active | **Implements**: -
**Integrates**: LIB-d00007

The app relies on an append-only event log, implemented by the library.

## Assertions

A. The app's event log SHALL be append-only.

*End* *App needs an append-only log* | **Hash**: f3f52ca4
